title: Bubbles!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
See that bubble float up high!
It shines up in the sky!
I reach and—Pop!—oh my!
Rainbow dots on my nose!

[chorus]
Bubbles! Bubbles! Fly with me!
Bubbles! Bubbles! Dance so free!
Bubbles! Bubbles! One, two, three—
Watch them sparkle in the light!

[verse 2]
I blow one big and round!
It wiggles, wobbles down.
It lands—plop!—on the ground.
Now my shoe’s a bubble town!

[chorus]
Bubbles! Bubbles! Fly with me!
Bubbles! Bubbles! Dance so free!
Bubbles! Bubbles! One, two, three—
Watch them sparkle in the light!

[ending]
My hands are wet and soapy.
The wand is sleepy too.
Night-night, bubbles… shhh… *yawn*…
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps, 126 BPM, groovy and melodic, catchy hook, warm rhythm, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
instruments: acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps
scene: The late afternoon sun slants through the kitchen window, glinting off the just-opened bottle of soapy liquid—your chubby fingers clutch the wand, eyes wide as the first iridescent orb wobbles free, and you shriek *"Bubbles!"* while launching into a spinning, giggling dance, bare feet slapping the linoleum.
cover_description: A chubby hand holds a bubble wand, tiny rainbows swirling in the air.
